title: Tartu, Tartu County — Cost of Living, Housing & Relocation Guide [2026]
description: Complete guide to Tartu, Tartu County: cost of living, home prices, neighborhoods, remote work readiness, and relocation tips.
content:
Overview

Tartu is a city in Tartu County with a population of 97,759. Estonia’s university city and intellectual heart, a 2024 European Capital of Culture with a historic university, a vibrant student atmosphere, and the Emajõgi River.

Last updated: July 13, 2026
